imageCrop.dragHint: Drag the image to reposition; slide to zoom.

rules.title: Rules
rules.none: No rules have been posted yet.
rules.serverNone: This server has not posted its own rules.

joinFlow.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
joinFlow.pickRoles: Pick a few roles to get started. You can change these any time.

landing.notFound: That community is private or no longer exists.
landing.gateApply: This community accepts new members by application. Create a free {{site}} account, then apply to join.
landing.gateOpen: Create a free {{site}} account to step into this community's rooms and forums.
landing.worldHint: Read this community's lore before you join.

inviteLanding.invalidBody: The link may have expired, been revoked, or reached its limit. Ask the person who invited you for a fresh one.
inviteLanding.adultNote: This is an 18+ community. You must be an adult to join.
inviteLanding.ctaMemberBody: Step back inside whenever you like.
inviteLanding.ctaAnonBody: Create a free {{site}} account and you'll land right in this community, or sign in if you already have one.
inviteLanding.ctaAuthedBody: One click and you're in — this invite takes you straight to the community.
inviteLanding.ctaApplicationBody: This community reviews who joins. Create a free {{site}} account (or sign in), then apply from the community's page.
inviteLanding.ctaApplicationAuthedBody: This community reviews who joins. Apply from its page and staff will look at your request.

invitePanel.title: Invite people to {{name}}
invitePanel.subtitle: Share a link; anyone who opens it can join — or make an account and land right here.
invitePanel.createOff: Creating new links is turned off for you here, but your links below still work — copy or revoke them anytime.
invitePanel.capReached: You've reached your limit of {{cap}} active links. Revoke one to make room.
invitePanel.empty: No invite links yet. Create one and share it anywhere.

rail.discoverOrCreate: Discover servers, or apply to create your own

discover.title: Discover servers
discover.searchAria: Search servers by name or tag
discover.emptyCatalog: No other servers to explore yet.
discover.emptyCatalogApply: Be the first to raise one.

cta.pendingBody: Your server {{name}} (/s/{{slug}}) is awaiting a moderator's decision.
cta.pendingNote: We'll notify you here and in chat once it's reviewed. You can raise another server after this one is decided.
cta.raiseBody: Gather your own community with its own rooms, address, and economy. Submit a short application and our moderators take it from there.
cta.rejectedNote: Your last application for {{name}} wasn't approved: "{{note}}". You're welcome to revise it and apply again.

card.ownerTitle: View {{name}}'s profile — message them to ask about joining
card.staffEnterTitle: Global staff: enter to moderate without joining
card.defaultOnTitle: Your default server: your profile shows this server's identity. Click to clear.
card.defaultOffTitle: Set as my default: your profile will show this server's rank, border, and name style.
card.defaultOnAria: {{name}} is your default server, click to clear
card.inviteBlurb: This server is invite-only. Enter the code you were given to join and enter.
card.applyBlurb: Joining is by application. The owner reviews each request before letting you in.
card.applyPlaceholder: Tell this server's owner why you'd like to join (optional).
card.applyNotice: You'll get a notice once it's decided.

form.sentBody: Application sent. The site's moderators will review it; you'll get a notice here and in chat when it's decided.
form.pendingBody: Your application for {{name}} (/s/{{slug}}) is pending review.
form.oneAtATime: One application at a time. You can apply again once it's decided.
form.purposePlaceholder: Tell the reviewers what community this server gathers and what its rooms will hold.
form.reviewNote: Reviewed by the site's moderators. Approved servers appear in the catalog with you as owner.

eventsPanel.title: Community events
eventsPanel.noneUpcoming: No upcoming events yet. Pick a day above, or check back soon.
eventsPanel.seriesRsvpHint: This event repeats. Your RSVP applies to the whole series.
eventsPanel.externalConfirm: This opens a page outside the site: {{host}}. Continue?

perms.cantGrant: You don't hold this permission yourself, so you can't grant it.

autoRules.none: No rules. Members only get this role when added by hand.

overview.name: Name
overview.taglinePlaceholder: One line under the server's name.
overview.descriptionPlaceholder: The long-form welcome. Same HTML rules as profile bios; shown on the server's page.
overview.tagsHint: Genres people can search by in Discover (e.g. high fantasy, sci-fi, 18+).
overview.systemJoinNote: This is the home server. Everyone is a member, so it can't be gated.
overview.modeOpenHint: Anyone signed in can join instantly.
overview.modeApplicationHint: People apply; you (or your mods) approve them.
overview.modeInviteHint: Hidden: entered only with an invite code.
overview.applicationPromptPlaceholder: Tell the owner why you'd like to join.
overview.publicBrowsingHint: Visitors on /s/{{slug}} can browse without an account. Posting and joining always require signing in.
overview.systemNsfwNote: This is the home server. It stays open to every member, so it can't be marked 18+.
overview.nsfwHint: Members must be 18 or older to join. Members under 18 cannot see this community anywhere on the site.
overview.nsfwTip: Tip: set a public banner in Appearance so discovery cards and link previews stay safe for everyone.
overview.permanentAddress: The address (/s/{{slug}}) is permanent so shared links never break.
overview.nsfwConfirm: Make "{{name}}" an 18+ community? Members under 18 are removed from its rooms right away and can no longer see it.
overview.worldHint: Feature one of your worlds as this community's lore. It shows on the public page and Discover card, and rooms without their own world link carry its banner in chat. Private worlds stay hidden from anyone who can't open them.
overview.worldEmpty: You don't have any worlds yet. Create one from the Worlds catalog to feature it here.

appearance.iconHint: Shown as a round tile in the server rail.
appearance.borderColorTitle: Accent ring around the rail icon
appearance.colorsHint: The fallback color is the lettered tile when no icon is set. The border color is the accent ring around the server's rail icon.
appearance.bannerHint: This preview matches your top bar (same shape). Position the banner here and it lands the same up top. Discover cards are taller, so they show a bit more.
appearance.topBarHeightHint: Sets the height of the banner band in the top bar (the rest of the chat is unaffected).
appearance.publicBannerHint: Shown on discovery cards, share pages, and link previews. If you leave this empty, those places show your community name and colors instead of banner art.
appearance.wordmarkHint: Replaces the app logo in the top bar so members know which server they're in.
appearance.themeHint: A palette for this server's pages only. Chat and the userlist are untouched.
appearance.designStyleHint: The visual treatment: ornaments, borders, textures. Applies to this server's pages for every visitor. "Use default" follows each visitor's own design.

rooms.blurb: Create, rename, retopic, set message expiry, or remove this server's rooms. (Day-to-day room commands like <cmd>/topic</cmd> still work in chat too.)
rooms.adultChannelHint: Adds an adults-only side to this room with its own chat feed, behind a SFW/18+ toggle on the room's row. Members under 18 only ever see the SFW side. Turning it off keeps its history for later.
rooms.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Anyone inside is moved to the landing room; its messages are removed.
rooms.passwordKeepPlaceholder: New password (leave blank to keep the current one)
rooms.passwordRequired: Set a password to make this room private.
rooms.visibilityHint: Public rooms are listed and anyone can join. Private rooms need the password (or an invite). You can change this any time.
rooms.keepWhenEmpty: Keep this room even when empty
rooms.keepWhenEmptyCreateHint: On (recommended): the channel stays put. Off: it's removed automatically once everyone leaves.
rooms.defaultRoomHint: Where members land on a fresh login or when they enter this server. Only one room can be the landing; turning this on moves it here.
rooms.staffOnlyHint: Hide this room from everyone but staff: you, this room's mods, this server's staff, and site staff. It stays a normal room for them, with a normal member list.
rooms.nsfwCreateHint: Members under 18 cannot see or enter it.
rooms.allNsfwNote: This community is 18+, so every room in it is 18+.
rooms.name: Name
rooms.postModeHint: Makes this a public info channel (like a welcome or rules channel): anyone can read it, but only you, this room's mods, and this server's staff can post.
rooms.postRolesHint: People with any checked role can post here. Staff can always post.
rooms.postNeedsRole: Check at least one role, or pick Info channel / Everyone.
rooms.richTextHint: Simple hides the heading and alignment options in the message box. Bold, colors, lists, links, and the rest stay. Older messages keep looking the way they were sent.
rooms.accessNeedsRole: Check at least one role, or switch back to Everyone.
rooms.accessHint: Only people with a checked role can see or enter this room. You, this server's staff, and site staff always can.
rooms.accessDeleteWarn: If the last checked role is deleted in the Roles tab, this room becomes visible to everyone again.
rooms.accessAdultChannelNote: This room's 18+ channel copied these roles when it was turned on and keeps its own copy from then on.

roleGates.noGroups: No roles yet. Create one in the Roles tab first.
roleGates.loadFailed: Couldn't load this room's role settings.

rooms.lifetimeMinutesRequired: Enter how many minutes messages should last.
rooms.lifetimeCustomHint: Messages older than this many minutes are deleted automatically.
rooms.lifetimeNeverWarn: Messages here are never auto-deleted, so this room's history grows forever. Keeping it tidy is up to you.
rooms.keepWhenEmptyEditHint: Off: the room is removed automatically once everyone leaves.
rooms.nsfwEditHint: Members under 18 cannot see or enter it. Turning it on removes anyone under 18 right away; messages sent while it is 18+ stay hidden from them even if you turn it off later.
rooms.iconHint: An emoji (like 🎭) or an https image link, shown beside the room's name.
rooms.categoryHint: The section this room lists under in the room list. Uncategorized rooms show at the end of the list.
rooms.categoryCreateHint: The section this room lists under in the room list. "Automatic" follows the default rules from the Room categories manager; with no defaults set, the room has no category and shows at the end of the list.

categories.title: Room categories
categories.hint: Optional sections for the room list, like a table of contents. Rooms without a category show at the end of the list, so you can skip this entirely.
categories.none: No categories yet. Rooms simply list in order.
categories.deleteConfirm: Delete the "{{name}}" category? Its rooms are kept and move to the end of the list.
categories.emptyBucket: No rooms in this category yet. Pick it in a room's editor.
categories.defaultsHint: You can mark one category as the home for new rooms, and point roles at a category so rooms created by those members land there.
categories.defaultHint: New rooms land in this category unless their creator picks one. Only one category can be the default.
categories.rolesLabel: Default for rooms created by these roles
categories.rolesHint: A new room made by someone with one of these roles lands in this category. Ticking a role that already points at another category moves it here.

members.heading: Members ({{n}})
members.makeModTitle: Promote to moderator with the default power set (tune it in Staff)
members.onlyYou: No members yet beyond you. Approved applicants and people who join appear here.

users.blurb: Find any member and moderate them here, no need to catch them in a room. Muting silences them across this server; banning blocks its rooms and strips their role; removing drops their membership. Every action is logged in the Mod Log.
users.bannedChipTitle: Lift this ban from the Bans tab

banModal.description: Blocks {{server}}'s rooms only. The rest of the Spire is untouched. A timed ban lifts itself when it expires.

roles.rolesPointer: Looking for member roles — colors, badges, self-select, room access? Those live in the <link>Roles</link> tab.
roles.noneYet: None yet. Appoint a helper below: pick the Moderator tier for chat moderation, or Admin for full management. Neither can touch the owner's content or change the server's appearance.
roles.moderatorBlurb: Chat moderation: handle reports, kick & mute, tidy others' messages. The everyday helper.
roles.adminOwnerOnly: Only the owner can appoint an admin.
roles.adminBlurb: Full management: members, rooms, roles, earning, everything. Cannot change appearance, transfer, or delete.
roles.presetNote_one: Starts with the chat-moderation preset ({{count}} power). Customize to add or remove individual powers.
roles.presetNote_other: Starts with the chat-moderation preset ({{count}} powers). Customize to add or remove individual powers.
roles.adminPowersNote: Admins hold every moderation power except <perm>Manage appearance</perm> ({{n}} powers), and can't transfer or delete the server.

transfer.title: Transfer ownership
transfer.blurb: Hand this server to another member. You step down to admin (you keep moderation reach, but lose owner-only acts). This can't be undone by you afterward.
transfer.confirm: Transfer {{server}} to {{name}}? You will step down to admin.

usergroups.staffPointer: Looking to appoint moderators or admins? That's the <link>Staff</link> tab.
usergroups.defaultBlurb: The default role applies to every participant. Editing its features changes what members without a role can do. Leave the boxes on to keep the server fully open.
usergroups.selectableHint: Lets any member add or remove themselves from this role (a self-role). Auto-joined members keep it even if they leave.
usergroups.descriptionPlaceholder: A short line shown next to the self-role toggle and in onboarding.
usergroups.showBadgeLabel: Show as a badge in the userlist
usergroups.showBadgeHint: Members wear a small chip with this role's name and color next to their name in the room userlist. If someone has several badge roles, the one lowest in your role order wins. Names themselves never change color.
usergroups.autoJoinHint: Members who meet every rule get this role automatically (checked when they next post). You can still add people by hand below.
usergroups.blurb: Roles bundle member features (posting, images, invites) and a color, and apply them to people. Everyone has the default role; named roles layer extra features on top, by hand or by auto-join rules. Members can pick self-roles for themselves, a role can show as a userlist badge, and the Rooms tab can limit who sees or posts in a room by role. Moderation powers come from the Staff tab, never from a role.
usergroups.deleteConfirm: Delete the "{{name}}" role? Members lose its permissions.

applications.notInApplicationMode: This server isn't in application mode right now. The queue below only fills while "How people join" is set to "application" (Overview tab).
applications.noneWaiting: No one is waiting at the gate.
applications.declinePrompt: Decline {{name}}? Optional note shown to them:

bans.blurb: A server ban blocks this server's rooms only. The rest of the Spire is untouched. Banning strips any role the user held here and evicts them from its rooms.
bans.none: No bans. May it stay that way.

modLog.inviteRevokeMembership: Invite links revoked (member left or was removed)
modLog.blurb: Every moderation action taken on this server, newest first. Shown to the owner and all moderators.

rulesTab.blurb: Your server's welcome and rules. Leave any field blank to inherit the platform default. HTML copy follows the same rules as profile bios.
rulesTab.welcomePlaceholder: Shown to members when they enter the server.
rulesTab.newUserWelcomePlaceholder: Shown the first time someone joins.

settings.retentionError: Message retention must be a duration like 30d (leave blank to inherit).
settings.editWindowError: Edit window must be a duration like 5m, or 0 to disable edits (leave blank to inherit).
settings.editWindowMaxError: Edit window must be 7 days or less.
settings.blurb: Leave any field blank to inherit the platform default. Durations take friendly values like <v>30d</v>, <v>12h</v>, or <v>5m</v>.
settings.retentionHint: How long messages are kept before pruning. Use a duration like 90d or 12h.
settings.maxRoomsHint: Cap on rooms a member may open here.
settings.maxMessageHint: Character cap for a chat message.
settings.editWindowHint: How long after sending an author can still edit a message. Use a duration like 30s / 5m / 1h, or 0 to disable edits.
settings.maxForumPostHint: Character cap for a forum post.

onboarding.blurb: Ask new members a few questions when they join. Each answer can hand them a self-role, so people land in the right roles from the start.
onboarding.showOnJoinHint: When on, new members see these prompts the first time they enter. Editing the flow re-shows it to everyone.
onboarding.noSelfRoleGroups: No self-roles yet. In the Roles tab, edit a role and turn on "Members can pick this" — those roles become the answer options here.
onboarding.questionPlaceholder: Question (e.g. What do you like to play?)
onboarding.noOptions: No options yet. Add one below.

tabDesc.overview: Your community's name, description, and how people join.
tabDesc.appearance: Logo, colors, and the design your community wears.
tabDesc.rooms: Every room in this community, in one list.
tabDesc.members: Everyone who belongs here, and the option to remove someone.
tabDesc.users: Find one member fast to mute, ban, or remove them.
tabDesc.roles: Appoint mods and admins, and choose exactly what each helper may do.
tabDesc.usergroups: Create roles with a name and color. Members can pick some for themselves, wear them as userlist badges, and rooms can be limited to specific roles.
tabDesc.applications: Requests from people who want to join. Approve or decline.
tabDesc.invites: Shareable invite links: who may create them, every live link, and one-click copy.
tabDesc.reports: Complaints about messages in this community. Review and act.
tabDesc.modcases: Your moderation casebook here: incidents, updates, and outcomes.
tabDesc.bans: Who is banned here, for how long, and the tools to undo it.
tabDesc.modlog: A record of every moderation action taken in this community.
tabDesc.emoticons: Upload and manage this community's own sticker sheets.
tabDesc.announcements: Banners and scheduled notices your members will see.
tabDesc.events: Plan gatherings on the community calendar, with optional reminders.
tabDesc.faqs: Questions and answers new members often need.
tabDesc.commandsTitles: Custom chat commands, and the titles members can carry.
tabDesc.earning: Rewards for being active: ranks, currency, the shop, and hand-outs.
tabDesc.rules: Write this community's rules and welcome text.
tabDesc.onboarding: Ask new members a question or two and sort them into roles.
tabDesc.settings: Limits for this community: message length, room caps, and chat history.

whoHint.staff: Only helpers with the invites power can share links (how it's always worked).
whoHint.roles: Members holding the roles you pick below can share links.
whoHint.all: Anyone who belongs here can share links.

invites.noRoles: This community has no roles yet. Create some on the roles tab first.
invites.rolesEmptyWarn: No roles picked — until you pick at least one, only staff can create links.
invites.createHint: The link opens a public page with your community's name and banner, and a join button.
invites.maxUsesInvalid: Enter a whole number of 1 or more, or leave empty for unlimited.
invites.revokeConfirm: Revoke this invite link? Anyone holding it won't be able to use it anymore.

shell.title: Server settings
shell.noPowers: You don't have any management powers on this server.

announceTab.bannerBlurb: Rows here render in a rotating banner above this server's chat. The marquee fades between entries every few seconds when two or more are enabled. Members can dismiss the bar for themselves; the dismissal persists in their browser.
announceTab.scheduledBlurb: Rows here fire as an /announce at the configured time. With no target room, the announcement reaches every room in this server. One-shot rows auto-disable after firing; recurring rows re-arm to now + interval on each fire, so a restart mid-cycle won't double-fire to catch up.
announceTab.deleteBannerConfirm: Delete this banner? Members lose it on next refresh.
announceTab.bannerCount: {{len}} / {{max}}. Both formats supported; Markdown converts to HTML on save.
announceTab.colorInvalid: Color must be `#rrggbb` or a `theme:<slot>` token.
announceTab.scheduledBodyPlaceholder: **Daily reminder:** Check the [event board](/rules#events) for tonight's sessions.
announceTab.scheduleHint: Interval (e.g. 1d8h) for recurring, or an ISO datetime for a one-shot. Minimum interval is 1 minute; maximum 30 days.
announceTab.chatPreview: Preview (as it will render in chat)

commandsTab.noPermission: You don't hold the commands or titles permission on this server.
commandsTab.commandsBlurb: This server's own slash commands, beyond the built-ins. Names are shared across the whole site, so a name already taken elsewhere is rejected.
commandsTab.socialGamesBlurb: Reward + duration for the built-in social games on THIS server. "Inherits" means it uses the platform default until you set your own; Reset returns to inheriting.
commandsTab.rewardIgnored: Reward fields ignored (prize is the host's stake).
commandsTab.kindSay: say - renders as a normal message
commandsTab.templateTokensHint: Drop in pieces like these; the Help, Formatting tab lists them all with examples.
commandsTab.allowInlineHint: Lets people splice this into a sentence with !{{name}}. The standalone /{{name}} form keeps working either way.
commandsTab.cssHint: Typography + color only; other properties are dropped on save.
commandsTab.titlesBlurb: This server's mutual-title kinds. People claim them via {{cmd}}. {{target}} is the other party's name. Symmetric kinds share one label; asymmetric kinds (mentor / apprentice) set distinct A and B labels. Slugs are shared across the whole site.
commandsTab.deleteKindInUseConfirm: Delete this kind? {{n}} active or pending title(s) of this kind will also be removed.
commandsTab.targetHint: {target} is replaced with the other party's display name.

availability.heading: Command availability
availability.blurb: Turn chat commands off for this server, or limit them to specific roles.
availability.staffNote: Server staff and site staff always keep every command, and /help can never be turned off.
availability.needsRole: Check at least one role, or switch back to Everyone.
availability.zeroRoleFallback: If every checked role is later deleted in the Roles tab, the command becomes available to everyone again.

eventsTab.heading: Community events
eventsTab.blurb: Schedule sessions, tournaments, or lore nights on this server's calendar. Members can RSVP going, maybe, or can't make it, and an optional reminder pings everyone who's going a little before it starts. Cancelling keeps the event on the calendar marked cancelled; deleting removes it entirely.
eventsTab.cancelConfirm: Cancel this event? It stays on the calendar marked cancelled.
eventsTab.deleteConfirm: Delete this event? RSVPs are lost and members lose it on refresh.
eventsTab.descriptionPlaceholder: What's happening, who it's for, anything to prep.
eventsTab.localClockHint: Times use your local clock; members see them in theirs.
eventsTab.reminderHint: Pings everyone RSVP'd going or maybe, once, this far before the start.
eventsTab.endAfterStart: The end time must be after the start time.
eventsTab.messageLinkHint: Use “Copy message link” on any chat message, then paste it here.
eventsTab.messageLinkInvalid: That doesn't look like a message link.
eventsTab.noForums: This server has no forums to link yet.
eventsTab.forumEventHint: Forum-linked events count as forum events and show on the forum's public page.
eventsTab.repeatEndsAfter: Ends after a number of times
eventsTab.repeatDaysHint: Pick none to repeat on the start day's weekday.
eventsTab.recurrenceStartHint: The Starts date sets the first time this happens and its time of day; repeats follow on from there. So set when the first one is, then choose how it repeats below.
eventsTab.repeatUntilInvalid: The repeat end must be after the event start.
eventsTab.recurrenceDstHint: Repeats keep an even spacing worldwide, so your local start time can shift by an hour when daylight saving changes.
eventsTab.seriesHint: Editing or cancelling affects every repeat, and RSVPs cover the whole series.

faqsTab.heading: FAQ entries
faqsTab.blurb: This server's question/answer entries, shown to members who open its help. Answers accept Markdown or HTML.

reportsTab.viewAuthorTitle: View this member's profile to verify the report
reportsTab.notePlaceholder: Resolution note (optional, kept in the Mod Log)
reportsTab.blurb: Reports your members filed against this server's messages. Direct-message and profile reports go to the platform team, not here.

modCasesTab.deleteNoteConfirm: Delete this note? This cannot be undone (its updates and backed-up evidence go too).
modCasesTab.deleteCaseConfirm: Delete this case? This cannot be undone (its updates and backed-up evidence go too).
modCasesTab.statusSelectTitle: Optionally change status with this update
modCasesTab.identityGone: That identity no longer exists (renamed away or deleted).
modCasesTab.heading: Moderation case log
modCasesTab.blurb: A record of complaints, disputes, and notes your team handled on this server: who complained, about whom or what, and how it was resolved. Reporter and subject accept a plain name or an {{id}}/{{cid}} token to link the exact identity. Banning a member happens on the Bans tab; this log records the outcome. This is separate from the read-only Mod Log audit feed.
modCasesTab.resolutionPlaceholder: Leave blank while open; add progress via Updates after saving
modCasesTab.evidenceHintBlock: Snapshots those chat messages onto the case so they survive cleanup. Only messages from this server's rooms can be attached.
modCasesTab.backedUpPartial: Backed up {{found}} of {{requested}} messages ({{skipped}} skipped: not found, or from another server's room).

emoticonsTab.heading: This server's emoticons
emoticonsTab.blurb: Each sheet is a 4×4 grid. Leave a label blank or "empty" to hide a cell from the picker.
emoticonsTab.noSheets: No emoticon sheets on this server yet.
emoticonsTab.sharedBlurb: Available to every server. Edit these from the platform Emoticons panel.
emoticonsTab.sheetImageLabel: Sheet image (PNG / JPG / WebP / GIF, 4×4 grid)
emoticonsTab.deleteSheetConfirm: Delete "{{name}}" ({{slug}})? Every reaction placed with this sheet on any message or DM will also be removed. Cannot be undone.
emoticonsTab.cellLabelsHint: Cell labels (4×4, row-major). Empty or "empty" = hidden from picker.
emoticonsTab.rejectPrompt:
Reject "{{name}}" from {{submitter}}?

Optional reason (shown to the submitter):
emoticonsTab.rejectedAlert: Rejected. Refunded {{amount}} Currency to the submitter.
emoticonsTab.submissionsBlurb: Reject refunds the paid Currency and deletes the image. Approve makes the sheet live on this server.

earningTab.heading: Earning
earningTab.blurb: Tune this server's earning faucet and sinks, and grant, revoke, or claw back awards and cosmetics. XP, Currency, ranks and cosmetics are tracked separately per server, so everything here affects this server only. The shared rank, item, name-style and border designs and their prices are set once in the platform admin panel and apply everywhere.
earningTab.clearOverrideConfirm: Stop overriding the economy on this server and inherit the platform defaults?
earningTab.inheritingNote: This server currently inherits the platform default economy. Saving any change below starts a per-server override.
earningTab.overrideNote: This server has its own economy override. Clear it to go back to inheriting the platform default.
earningTab.masterSwitch: Earning enabled on this server (master switch: off means nothing earns here)
earningTab.sourceToggles: Source toggles (off = that pool earns 0 from that source)
earningTab.allowTransfers: Allow members to send each other Currency on this server
earningTab.flashSalesEnabled: Flash sales enabled on this server
earningTab.subsystems: Subsystems (Inherit keeps the platform default; On/Off pins this server)
earningTab.grantBlurb: Awards land on this server only. Cosmetic keys (style / border / item / rank) are the shared catalog keys from the platform admin panel: enter the exact key; an unknown key is rejected.
earningTab.xpHelp: Positive credits, negative debits. Rank/tier recompute after the credit.
earningTab.itemHelp: Positive deposits into the target's OOC inventory on this server, negative revokes. Bypasses shop/sale gates.
earningTab.needLookupUsername: Enter a username to look up.
earningTab.resetUserConfirm: Reset ALL of {{name}}'s earning state on this server (XP, Currency, ranks, owned cosmetics, equipped cosmetics)? This server only. Other servers are untouched.
earningTab.clawbackBlurb: Look up a member to see and revoke what they own on this server. Claw-backs and resets affect this server only.
earningTab.noPool: no pool on this server yet
earningTab.resetAll: Reset all earning on this server
earningTab.importBlurb: This server's catalog starts empty. Seed it from the Spire built-ins, then tune the copies below. Importing again only fills gaps, it never overwrites a row you have already edited.
earningTab.arcadeNote: Arcade items copies only the Eidolon Tamer's pets, food, toys, and potions plus its unlock flair, not the whole shop.
earningTab.ranksBlurb: Define this server's rank ladder, tier thresholds, and uploadable rank images.
earningTab.disableInstead: Disable instead: holders on this rank
earningTab.noRanks: No ranks yet on this server.
earningTab.nameStylesBlurb: HTML + CSS name templates members can buy and equip on this server.
earningTab.freeformBlurb: OOC avatar borders (image-URL or template). Members buy and equip these on this server.
earningTab.freeformNote: New rows are created in image-URL mode. Template-mode borders are managed in the platform admin panel.
earningTab.cosmeticsBlurb: Toggle and price this server's feature cosmetics (rows are seed-defined).
earningTab.itemsBlurb: This server's purchasable item catalog. Toggle, price, and pull from sale.
earningTab.transitionsBlurb: Re-price, disable, or reorder this server's room-switch animations. The animation set is fixed.
earningTab.flashSaleBlurb: Queue a specific discounted pick for a future date on this server.
